phenomenon: accent-driven near-homophone ASR errors (the M9/M10 historical set); real signal comes from the recorded variant
spoken: Every morning I take the bus to work and grab a sandwich at the deli next door. My grandmother raised three kids and a mother could not have done more. She taught me who I am today. She would pawn her jewelry to keep us fed, and she saved every dime she ever earned.
expected: Every morning I take the bus to work and grab a sandwich at the deli next door. My grandmother raised three kids and a mother could not have done more. She taught me who I am today. She would pawn her jewelry to keep us fed, and she saved every dime she ever earned.
